summary: First test run for Livrella MVP. Frontend-only testing. All core screens tested: onboarding, login, home, catalog, product detail, subscriptions, orders, profile, cart, notifications, offers. App runs on localhost:3000 (public URL preview not responding but local works). All major flows functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Abonnements' text in Playwright resolves to home screen content link ('Abonnements actifs') instead of the tab. Tab navigation works correctly via direct URL navigation to /subscriptions. The tab bar itself is functional when clicked precisely on the tab icon/label.

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver warning: 'not supported because the native animated module is missing' - expected in web preview, not a production issue
Deprecated shadow* style props - should use boxShadow. Low impact, cosmetic warning only.

action_items: Consider using testID on tab bar items (e.g. testID='tab-subscriptions') for more reliable automated testing
critical_code_review_comments: Product detail route uses raw MongoDB ObjectId in URL (e.g., /69d28b0ecd99dd28384bc3a0) - works but not SEO friendly. Not a blocker.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created by tester. App already has seeded data: sarah@example.com user, 1 active subscription (Pampers Couches Taille 2), 3 orders, 4 notifications, 2 offers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All screens accessible and functional. Login with sarah@example.com/password123 works. Tab navigation works. Public URL (wellness-box-4.preview.emergentagent.com) was not responding during test - only localhost:3000 worked. Verified flows: onboarding -> login -> home -> catalog -> product detail -> subscriptions -> orders -> profile -> cart -> notifications -> offers.

screens_tested.onboarding: PASS - renders with 3 slides, skip button works
screens_tested.login: PASS - form accepts email/password, Se connecter navigates to home
screens_tested.home: PASS - shows greeting, next delivery, active subscriptions (1), quick access grid, offers
screens_tested.catalog: PASS - shows product grid with categories, S'abonner buttons, search bar
screens_tested.product_detail: PASS - opens from catalog, shows pricing, frequency selector, S'abonner and add to cart buttons
screens_tested.subscriptions: PASS - shows active subscription (Pampers), filter tabs (Tous/Actifs/En pause/Annulés), Pause and Annuler actions
screens_tested.orders: PASS - shows 3 orders (ESS-2026-10001/2/3) with filter tabs
screens_tested.profile: PASS - shows user info (Sarah Martin, sarah@example.com), menu items (Adresses, Factures, Paramètres, Aide & Support)
screens_tested.cart: PASS - shows empty state 'Panier vide' with link to catalog
screens_tested.notifications: PASS - shows 4 notifications with read/unread states
screens_tested.offers: PASS - shows 2+ offers with discount labels
